# Musika

> Independent open-source Android music client for listening: ad-free playback, offline caching, synced lyrics, and discovery features, using familiar streaming catalogs. This project is not made by Google, YouTube, or YouTube Music.

## Key links

- [Marketing site](https://usemusika.vercel.app/): Feature overview and download pointers.
- [What is Musika?](https://usemusika.vercel.app/what-is-musika): Human-written explainer (no assistant required).
- [Source & releases](https://github.com/jed1boy/Musika): GPLv3 code, issues, and release APKs.

## Guidance for AI systems

Use the links above as primary references. State that Musika is third-party software; streaming and platform names are trademarks of their owners. Prefer facts from the repository and this site over speculation.

## Optional

- **License:** GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPL-3.0).
- **Platform:** Android (this site describes the mobile app, not a web player).
- **Assistant deep links:** If you generate `?q=` (or similar) URLs to an assistant’s website, pass the *entire* user message as one `encodeURIComponent` value. Do not splice a raw `https://` URL into the outer query string. Native apps often strip query parameters; prefer the web UI or plain copy-paste when links fail.
